name: antigravity-context-watcher
description: Estimate retained Antigravity context for a selected model, inspect Antigravity state, and copy handoff prompts.

commands.title: Context Watcher: Copy Model Budget Override Template
Context Watcher: Copy New Chat Handoff
Context Watcher: Copy Summarize Current Chat Prompt

contextWatcher.modelSelectionMode.description: How the extension should choose the model profile in V1.

contextWatcher.activeModelId.description: The selected model profile id used for counting.

contextWatcher.activeBrainPath.description: Optional absolute path to a specific Antigravity brain session directory.

contextWatcher.autoPinVisibleSession.description: Automatically pin Context Watcher to the visible Antigravity chat when you switch to a different chat record or conversation tab.

contextWatcher.modelProfiles.description: Optional model profile overrides. Objects are matched by id.

contextWatcher.modelBudgetOverrides.markdownDescription: Manual effective budget overrides keyed by model id. Use this when Antigravity's practical context limit is lower than the provider maximum.

budgetMode.description: Optional override if this model should use separate or combined budgeting.

effectiveContextTokens.description: Effective shared context window for combined-budget models.

effectiveMaxInputTokens.description: Effective max input tokens for separate-budget models.

effectiveMaxOutputTokens.description: Effective max output tokens used by the watcher.

reservedOutputTokens.description: Reserved output allowance for combined-budget models.

contextWatcher.warningThreshold.description: Warn when estimated input usage exceeds this fraction.

contextWatcher.criticalThreshold.description: Mark usage as critical when estimated input usage exceeds this fraction.

contextWatcher.reservedOutputTokens.description: Default output reserve for combined-budget models unless overridden per profile.

contextWatcher.includeBrainArtifactsInEs.description: Whether to include core Antigravity brain artifacts such as task.md, implementation_plan.md, analysis_report.md, and walkthrough.md in the estimate.

contextWatcher.compactorTokenLimit.description: Approximate token budget for the copied new-chat summary prompt.

contextWatcher.extraWatchPaths.description: Extra file or directory paths to include in the estimate.

contextWatcher.refreshIntervalMs.description: Polling interval for lightweight automatic refreshes.

contextWatcher.fullRefreshIntervalMs.description: How often automatic polling should perform a full live refresh instead of a lightweight refresh.
